title: Market Brief — Feb 22, 2026
content:
📈 STOCKS: Market flat in choppy trade, tech under pressure. Rotation into Financials & Media. NVDA earnings this week — the big catalyst.

₿ CRYPTO: BTC bounced but $72K is the key level. ETH/SOL/XRP lagging. CME going 24/7 → less weekend gap risk. Panic premium still in options.

⚡ CATALYST: NVIDIA earnings this week. CRM (Salesforce) earnings also in focus.

🔍 UNDER THE RADAR: MARA Holdings — unusual options activity. Direct BTC miner play.
